history.text: The Kingdom of Kerma emerged, giving the area a defined monarchical state structure.
The Kingdom of Kush emerged, giving the area a defined monarchical state structure.
Turco-Egyptian Sudan appears in Sudan's historical record.
Mahdist State appears in Sudan's historical record.
Anglo-Egyptian Condominium placed the territory under outside administration.
Sudan became independent, marking the start of modern sovereign statehood.
Democratic Republic of Sudan introduced a new form of state rule.
Republic of Sudan (1985–2019) introduced a new form of state rule.
